nasb.text: Yet they tempted and rebelled against the Most High God And did not keep His testimonies,

esv.text: Yet they tested and rebelled against the Most High God and did not keep his testimonies,

cnv.text: 但他們仍然試探和悖逆至高的　神， 不謹守他的法則。

ccb.text: 可是，他们仍旧试探上帝， 反叛至高者，不遵行祂的法度。

csbs.text: 但他们仍然试探、悖逆至高神， 不持守他的法度。
